falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a bear market acceleration, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal by showing clear downward momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: CBOE VIX closes above 30 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates extreme market fear and potential blowoff top, contradicting the 'HOLD' verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Directly contradicts the current blowoff score of 41, proving the pattern match is invalid

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
